name: Shrimp & Crab Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; cook until softened.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients (except shrimp, crabs, and spaghetti).
3. Bring to a boil and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Remove shells and legs from crabs, leaving meat intact; break crabs in half if needed.
5. Add shrimp and cooked crabs to the sauce; simmer an additional 30 minutes.
6. Add uncooked spaghetti to the sauce and stir until fully heated through.
7. Alternatively, pour sauce over cooked spaghetti for a quick assembly.
